label: Sikshya seven-course feature pack (+ long curricula)
description: Sample pack with varied pricing and modality demos. Two flagship rows are deliberately long-form: ten chapters each, ten curriculum items per chapter—mixing lengthy HTML lessons, two placeholder videos per chapter, quizzes, and assignments—ideal for stressing outlines, enrolment dashboards, grading queues, import cache, and list pagination.

courses.title: Sample: Quizzes & knowledge checks
courses.excerpt: A short read plus a full quiz. Ideal for testing grading and pass scores.
courses.content: Focus: quizzes and questions only—this row is intentionally free so you can test enroll and grading without checkout. Work through the intro, then take the end-of-chapter check.

chapters.title: What to expect
chapters.content: Read the lesson, then start the quiz when you are ready. You can re-run import to add a fresh copy on another site.

contents.title: How this sample quiz is structured
contents.content: Questions include multiple choice, true/false, and fill in the blank. The quiz uses a passing score and a time limit set in the pack.

contents.title: Knowledge check
contents.content: Answer every question. Submit when you are done.

questions.title: Which of these is a learning management system term?
A passing score is a percentage the learner should meet or exceed.
WordPress content is most commonly stored in which database?
Which is best for measuring recall on facts?

courses.title: Sample: Practice with assignments
courses.excerpt: Written tasks with points and type meta—a paid catalog row with one free-preview lesson.
courses.content: Focus: assignments and paid enrollment. The first lesson is marked free preview so unenrolled learners can sample content before checkout.

contents.title: Before you submit
contents.content: Read the brief, then open each assignment. Follow the word limits and use clear filenames if you upload files.

contents.title: Assignment: Reflect on a lesson you teach
contents.content: Write 150–200 words. Describe the learning outcome, one activity, and how you would know it worked.

contents.title: Assignment: Checklist for your next course
contents.content: Create a 5–7 item checklist (bullet list) for publishing a new course. Include at least one item about accessibility.

courses.title: Sample: Text and video lessons (no quiz or assignment)
courses.excerpt: Reading and videos only—priced with list + sale meta for storefront styling.
courses.content: Focus: text and video lessons with paid pricing and a sale price so you can confirm cards and checkout show strikethrough / effective price. No assessments in this path.

contents.title: Text: Learning objectives
contents.content: Good objectives are specific and measurable. Write them from the learner’s point of view (what they will be able to do).

contents.title: Text: Pacing a module
contents.content: Shorter steps reduce cognitive load. Group related ideas in one screen, and break long text into scannable subheads.

contents.title: Video: Public domain example (YouTube)
contents.content: This placeholder URL points to a well-known public sample video. Replace with your own embed in production.

contents.title: Video: How learners use the player
contents.content: Test captions, quality switching, and keyboard focus on your theme. The URL below is a second copy for variety.

courses.title: Sample: All content types in one place (long curriculum)
courses.excerpt: 10 chapters × 10 items repeating every modality together—ideal for validating mixed assessments at scale.
courses.content:
🧭 Mixed long path — Mirrors the miniature “everything in one chapter” motif, amplified across ten modules with deterministic structure.

This imported course is deliberately large: 10 chapters each with at least 10 items (mixed types). Use it to exercise outlines, cache invalidation after import, admin list paging, enrolment dashboards, moderation queues, and bulk operations.

Operational checklist for reviewers:

  • Replace streaming placeholders with compliant media licences.
  • Align quizzes and assignments with grading rubrics and academic integrity norms.
  • Confirm transactional emails/certificates behave with long completions.
  • Profile frontend queries if hosting is constrained—heavy trees spotlight N+1 issues early.

Delete wholesale once staging reflects your real syllabus; regenerate via this repo script if QA needs fresh volume again.

Pattern used here: motivate the idea in plain language, give a constrained example, name a common misconception, link forward to formative checks. Replace with disciplinary content when SMEs sign off.

  • Apply Chapter 1 ideas to an easy scenario learners already know.
  • Contrast with a neighbouring concept instructors say trips people up.
  • Prep for quizzes or assignments that bookend each chapter rhythm.

You may swap in transcripts, captions, downloadable handouts, diagrams, embeds, or H5P. Validate keyboard focus and colour contrast against your storefront theme—not only the admin SPA.

courses.title: Sample: Structured learning path (showcase — long curriculum)
courses.excerpt: 10 chapters × 10 items each: long readings, dual videos per chapter, quizzes, assignments. Paid + sale; first reading is free-preview.
courses.content:
📚 Showcase long path — Same catalogue positioning as the short showcase demo, rebuilt for outline stress tests and substantive course body copy.

This imported course is deliberately large: 10 chapters each with at least 10 items (mixed types). Use it to exercise outlines, cache invalidation after import, admin list paging, enrolment dashboards, moderation queues, and bulk operations.

Operational checklist for reviewers:

  • Replace streaming placeholders with compliant media licences.
  • Align quizzes and assignments with grading rubrics and academic integrity norms.
  • Confirm transactional emails/certificates behave with long completions.
  • Profile frontend queries if hosting is constrained—heavy trees spotlight N+1 issues early.

Delete wholesale once staging reflects your real syllabus; regenerate via this repo script if QA needs fresh volume again.

courses.excerpt: Second free row—short lessons to test progress and outlines without commerce.
courses.content: This is a simple starter course with short lessons only and free access. Pair it with paid rows to see mixed catalogs (free badges vs prices).

contents.title: Welcome to Sikshya
contents.content: You’re ready to learn. Use the left outline to move between lessons and track progress.

contents.title: How to complete a lesson
contents.content: Scroll, read/watch, then mark complete. Your progress updates instantly.

contents.title: Find your next course
contents.content: Use the course listing filters to browse by category and level. Add paid courses to cart when you’re ready.

courses.title: Sample: Mini course with one quiz
courses.excerpt: Low entry price, quiz with attempt limits—good for testing retakes on a paid course.
courses.content: Includes two lessons and a quick quiz using multiple choice and true/false only. Priced as an inexpensive paid row; the quiz sets a small attempt limit for retake behaviour.
